metadata.name: dungeon
metadata.description: Dungeon system for DungeonFighters - roguelike room progression

instructions.name: abandon_dungeon
docs: Abandon the dungeon (forfeit without rewards)

instructions.name: anchor_battle_slothash
docs: Step 2 of commit-anchor-reveal: permissionless. Any signer can call this
after `reveal_slot` has passed to lock slothash(reveal_slot) into the
BattleCommit PDA. Once anchored, reveal has no time pressure.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call this ix — payer just covers the tx fee. No state-creation rent.

instructions.name: claim_dungeon_loot
docs: Claim a single item from dungeon loot (call multiple times for multiple items)

accounts.name: inventory
docs: Player's inventory (will be reallocated by CPI)

instructions.name: claim_dungeon_loot_with_session
docs: Claim dungeon loot using session key (no wallet approval needed)

accounts.name: inventory
docs: Player's inventory (will be reallocated by CPI)

instructions.name: close_dungeon_choices
docs: Close a DungeonChoices account; rent refunded to its owner. Requires the
choices to have been consumed (i.e., a player_dungeon was already generated
from them) so mid-flow selection state isn't accidentally erased.

instructions.name: close_dungeon_config
docs: Close the DungeonConfig singleton. Root authority only — this invalidates
every dungeon template and admin-gated operation going forward.

instructions.name: close_dungeon_run
docs: Close a finished dungeon run

instructions.name: close_dungeon_run_with_session
docs: Close dungeon run using session key

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Session escrow receives rent from closed accounts

instructions.name: close_dungeon_template
docs: Close a DungeonTemplate; rent refunded to the config authority.

instructions.name: close_player_dungeon
docs: Close a player dungeon (returns rent)

instructions.name: close_player_dungeon_with_session
docs: Close a player dungeon using session key (rent goes to escrow)

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Session escrow receives rent from closed account

instructions.name: close_room_battle_log
docs: Close a room battle log (returns rent to owner)

accounts.name: dungeon_run
docs: The dungeon run this log belongs to (verifies ownership chain)

instructions.name: close_room_battle_log_with_session
docs: Close room battle log using session key

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Session escrow receives rent from closed accounts

instructions.name: commit_battle_room
docs: Battle the enemy in the current room (for template-based dungeons)
Step 1 of commit-anchor-reveal battle flow for a template room.
Locks the player into this battle without computing the outcome, so that
`simulateTransaction` can't preview the result. See anchor_battle_slothash
and reveal_battle_room for the rest of the flow.

instructions.name: commit_generated_battle_room
docs: Step 1 of commit-anchor-reveal battle flow for a generated room.

instructions.name: commit_generated_battle_room_with_session
docs: Battle generated room using session key
Session-signed step 1 of commit-anchor-reveal for generated rooms.

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Session escrow for automatic top-up

instructions.name: continue_to_next_room
docs: Continue to the next room in the dungeon (closes previous room's battle log)

accounts.name: previous_room_log
docs: The previous room's battle log - closed to recover rent

instructions.name: continue_to_next_room_with_session
docs: Continue to next room using session key

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Session escrow receives rent from closed accounts

instructions.name: create_dungeon_template
docs: Create a new dungeon template (admin only)
Templates are public and can be instantiated by any player

instructions.name: exit_dungeon
docs: Exit the dungeon early (after completing a room)

instructions.name: exit_dungeon_with_session
docs: Exit dungeon early using session key

instructions.name: forfeit_committed_battle
docs: If a commit exists but was never anchored and the anchor window has
expired, the player must forfeit to unblock the dungeon run. The result
is the same as losing the battle normally (permadeath + Failed run).

accounts.name: inventory
docs: Player's shared inventory — passed to player program on death to remove equipped items

instructions.name: forfeit_committed_battle_with_session
docs: Session-signed variant of forfeit_committed_battle.

accounts.name: inventory
docs: Player's shared inventory — passed to player program on death to remove equipped items

instructions.name: generate_dungeon_choices
docs: Generate exactly three dungeon options for the selected player.
Cannot be called again until one of the options is consumed.

instructions.name: generate_dungeon_choices_with_session
docs: Generate dungeon choices via session signer.

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Session escrow for automatic top-up

instructions.name: generate_player_dungeon
docs: Deprecated direct generate flow.
Use generate_dungeon_choices + generate_player_dungeon_from_choice.

instructions.name: generate_player_dungeon_from_choice
docs: Consume one pending option and create the generated player dungeon.

instructions.name: generate_player_dungeon_from_choice_with_session
docs: Consume one pending option and create a generated dungeon via session signer.

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Session escrow for automatic top-up

instructions.name: generate_player_dungeon_with_session
docs: Deprecated direct generate flow.
Use generate_dungeon_choices_with_session + generate_player_dungeon_from_choice_with_session.

accounts.name: session_signer
docs: The session keypair signs and pays for the transaction

accounts.name: authority
docs: The original wallet that owns the session (for ownership verification)

accounts.name: session
docs: Valid session linking session_key to authority

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Session escrow for automatic top-up

instructions.name: instantiate_dungeon
docs: Create a player dungeon instance from a template
The instance is private to the player who creates it

instructions.name: reveal_battle_room
docs: Step 3 of commit-anchor-reveal: once the anchor tx has written a durable
seed into BattleCommit, this ix simulates the battle using that seed and
commits the result.

accounts.name: inventory
docs: Player's shared inventory — passed to player program on death to remove equipped items

instructions.name: reveal_generated_battle_room
docs: Step 3 of commit-anchor-reveal for generated rooms.

accounts.name: inventory
docs: Player's shared inventory — passed to player program on death to remove equipped items

instructions.name: reveal_generated_battle_room_with_session
docs: Session-signed step 3 of commit-anchor-reveal for generated rooms.

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Session escrow for automatic top-up / rent refund on close

accounts.name: inventory
docs: Player's shared inventory — passed to player program on death to remove equipped items

instructions.name: set_template_enemy
docs: Set the enemy for a specific room in a template

instructions.name: start_dungeon_run
docs: Start a new dungeon run (only owner of the player dungeon can run it)

instructions.name: start_dungeon_run_with_session
docs: Start a dungeon run using session key

accounts.name: escrow
docs: Session escrow for automatic top-up

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Name must be 32 characters or less

errors.name: InvalidRoomCount
errors.msg: Room count must be between 1 and 10

errors.name: InvalidDifficulty
errors.msg: Difficulty must be between 1 and 100

errors.name: InvalidRoomIndex
errors.msg: Invalid room index

errors.name: InvalidPlayer
errors.msg: Player not found or invalid

errors.name: PlayerDead
errors.msg: Player is dead - heal before entering dungeon

errors.name: DungeonNotInProgress
errors.msg: Dungeon run is not in progress

errors.name: WrongEnemy
errors.msg: Wrong enemy for this room

errors.name: WrongDungeon
errors.msg: Wrong dungeon for this run

errors.name: NoMoreRooms
errors.msg: No more rooms in this dungeon

errors.name: RoomNotCompleted
errors.msg: Must complete current room before continuing

errors.name: DungeonStillInProgress
errors.msg: Dungeon run is still in progress - complete or abandon it first

errors.name: NotGeneratedDungeon
errors.msg: This is not a generated dungeon - use commit_battle_room/reveal_battle_room instead

errors.name: UseGeneratedBattle
errors.msg: This is a generated dungeon - use commit_generated_battle_room/reveal_generated_battle_room instead

errors.name: UseDungeonChoicesFlow
errors.msg: Direct generation is disabled - use dungeon choices flow

errors.name: NotDungeonOwner
errors.msg: You are not the owner of this dungeon

errors.name: InvalidEnvironment
errors.msg: Invalid environment

errors.name: InvalidPlayerLevel
errors.msg: Player level must be at least 1

errors.name: WrongPlayerForDungeon
errors.msg: This generated dungeon is bound to a different player

errors.name: WrongPlayerForDungeonRun
errors.msg: Dungeon run does not belong to this player

errors.name: DungeonChoicesPending
errors.msg: There are pending dungeon choices - select one before generating new choices

errors.name: DungeonChoicesUnavailable
errors.msg: Dungeon choices are unavailable - generate choices first

errors.name: InvalidDungeonChoiceIndex
errors.msg: Invalid dungeon choice index

errors.name: InvalidDungeonChoiceSet
errors.msg: Invalid dungeon choices account

errors.name: DungeonNotComplete
errors.msg: Dungeon must be completed or exited to claim loot

errors.name: NoLootAvailable
errors.msg: No loot available to claim

errors.name: LootAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Loot has already been claimed

errors.name: TemplateNotReady
errors.msg: Template is not fully configured - all rooms need enemies

errors.name: SessionExpired
errors.msg: Session has expired

errors.name: InvalidSession
errors.msg: Invalid session - session key or authority mismatch

errors.name: InsufficientEscrowBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient escrow balance - deposit more SOL

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized - admin authority required

errors.name: BattleRevealNotReady
errors.msg: Battle commit's reveal slot has not been reached yet; cannot anchor

errors.name: BattleAnchorExpired
errors.msg: Battle commit's anchor window has expired; call forfeit_committed_battle

errors.name: BattleNotAnchored
errors.msg: Battle must be anchored before revealing

errors.name: BattleAlreadyAnchored
errors.msg: Battle is already anchored; cannot re-anchor or forfeit

errors.name: BattleForfeitTooEarly
errors.msg: Cannot forfeit a battle before its anchor window expires

errors.name: BattleAlreadyCommitted
errors.msg: A battle is already committed for this dungeon run; resolve or forfeit it first

errors.name: InvalidSlotHashesAccount
errors.msg: SysvarSlotHashes account is invalid

errors.name: SlotHashNotAvailable
errors.msg: Slothash for the requested slot is no longer available

errors.name: BattleCommitMismatch
errors.msg: Battle commit does not match the provided dungeon run

types.name: Action
docs: An action that can be used in combat

types.name: ActionEffect
docs: Effects that can occur during combat from player actions

types.name: ActionSource
docs: Where an action comes from (innate class ability or equipment)

types.name: BattleCommit
docs: Commit-reveal handshake for a single battle. Created by commit_battle_*,
filled by anchor_battle_slothash, consumed (closed) by reveal_battle_* or
forfeit_committed_battle. Its existence on-chain = a battle is in progress
on the referenced dungeon_run.

fields.name: anchored_seed
docs: None until anchor_battle_slothash writes slothash(reveal_slot).

types.name: DungeonConfig
docs: Dungeon program admin config — singleton PDA

types.name: DungeonRun
docs: Active dungeon run

types.name: DungeonRunStatus
docs: Status of a dungeon run

types.name: DungeonTemplate
docs: Dungeon Template - Admin-created, public, can be instantiated by players

types.name: Enemy
docs: On-chain enemy instance used by battle/dungeon systems for template encounters

types.name: EnemyType
docs: All possible enemy types in the game
New enemy types should be added here and configured via EnemyTypeConfig

types.name: EventType
docs: Types of events that can occur during battle

types.name: GameSession
docs: Game Session - allows temporary keypair to act on behalf of wallet authority
This enables auto-signing transactions without wallet approval popups

types.name: GeneratedEnemy
docs: Generated enemy stats (used in procedural dungeons)

types.name: PlayerClass
docs: Player character classes - determines abilities and stat growth

types.name: PlayerDungeon
docs: Player Dungeon - Private instance owned by a player

types.name: RoomBattleLog
docs: Battle log for a single room

types.name: SessionEscrow
docs: Session Escrow - holds SOL that can be used to fund session keypairs
This is a PDA controlled by the authority, so funds are always recoverable
even if localStorage is lost (unlike the session keypair itself)
